description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image with mysql:latest, redis:latest, and postgres:latest services and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define the default test stage and add a test_async job that runs the commands npm install and node ./specs/start.js ./specs/async.spec.js. Add a test_db job that also runs npm install followed by node ./specs/start.js ./specs/db-postgres.spec.js. Both jobs run on all branches, have no artifacts, and rely on the shared node_modules cache.
